# sdwan_logging_feature_template (Resource)

This resource can manage a logging feature template.
  - Minimum SD-WAN Manager version: `15.0.0`

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sdwan_logging_feature_template" "example" {
  name              = "Example"
  description       = "My Example"
  device_types      = ["vedge-C8000V"]
  enable            = true
  maximum_file_size = 18
  rotation          = 10
  priority          = "information"
  remote_hosts = [
    {
      hostname_ipv4_address = "example"
      vpn_id                = 1
      source_interface      = "22"
      priority              = "information"
    }
  ]
  remote_ipv6_hosts = [
    {
      ipv6_hostname_ipv6_address = "example"
      vpn_id                     = 1
      source_interface           = "18"
      priority                   = "alert"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) The description of the feature template
- `device_types` (Set of String) List of supported device types
  - Choices: `vedge-C8000V`, `vedge-C8300-1N1S-4T2X`, `vedge-C8300-1N1S-6T`, `vedge-C8300-2N2S-6T`, `vedge-C8300-2N2S-4T2X`, `vedge-C8500-12X4QC`, `vedge-C8500-12X`, `vedge-C8500-20X6C`, `vedge-C8500L-8S4X`, `vedge-C8200-1N-4T`, `vedge-C8200L-1N-4T`
- `name` (String) The name of the feature template

### Optional

- `enable` (Boolean) Enable logging to local disk
  - Default value: `true`
- `enable_variable` (String) Variable name
- `maximum_file_size` (Number) Set maximum size of file before it is rotated
  - Range: `1`-`20`
  - Default value: `10`
- `maximum_file_size_variable` (String) Variable name
- `priority` (String) Set logging level for messages logged to disk
  - Choices: `emergency`, `alert`, `critical`, `error`, `warn`, `notice`, `information`
  - Default value: `information`
- `priority_variable` (String) Variable name
- `remote_hosts` (Attributes List) Enable logging to remote server (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--remote_hosts))
- `remote_ipv6_hosts` (Attributes List) Enable logging to remote IPv6 server (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--remote_ipv6_hosts))
- `rotation` (Number) Set number of syslog files to create before discarding oldest files
  - Range: `1`-`10`
  - Default value: `10`
- `rotation_variable` (String) Variable name

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the feature template
- `template_type` (String) The template type
- `version` (Number) The version of the feature template

<a id="nestedatt--remote_hosts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `remote_hosts`

Optional:

- `hostname_ipv4_address` (String) Set hostname or IPv4 address of server
- `hostname_ipv4_address_variable` (String) Variable name
- `optional` (Boolean) Indicates if list item is considered optional.
- `priority` (String) Set logging level for messages logged to server
  - Choices: `emergency`, `alert`, `critical`, `error`, `warn`, `notice`, `information`
  - Default value: `information`
- `priority_variable` (String) Variable name
- `source_interface` (String) Set interface to use to reach syslog server
- `source_interface_variable` (String) Variable name
- `vpn_id` (Number) Set VPN in which syslog server is located
  - Range: `0`-`65530`
  - Default value: `0`
- `vpn_id_variable` (String) Variable name


<a id="nestedatt--remote_ipv6_hosts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `remote_ipv6_hosts`

Optional:

- `ipv6_hostname_ipv6_address` (String) Set IPv6 hostname or IPv6 address of server
- `ipv6_hostname_ipv6_address_variable` (String) Variable name
- `optional` (Boolean) Indicates if list item is considered optional.
- `priority` (String) Set logging level for messages logged to server
  - Choices: `emergency`, `alert`, `critical`, `error`, `warn`, `notice`, `information`
  - Default value: `information`
- `priority_variable` (String) Variable name
- `source_interface` (String) Set interface to use to reach syslog server
- `source_interface_variable` (String) Variable name
- `vpn_id` (Number) Set VPN in which syslog server is located
  - Range: `0`-`65530`
  - Default value: `0`
- `vpn_id_variable` (String) Variable name

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import sdwan_logging_feature_template.example "f6b2c44c-693c-4763-b010-895aa3d236bd"
```
